series_metadata.series_description: Attorney research information compiled in the process of developing a bulletin, including attorney-client communication and attorney work product.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office until bulletin is rescinded, then destroy file. For a “rescission only” bulletin, retain file 1 year after the bulletin is issued, then destroy file. ; Electronic: In office until bulletin is rescinded, then destroy file. For a “rescission only” bulletin, retain file 1 year after the bulletin is issued, then destroy file., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
